summary: Moved install.sh, update.sh, and build-usb-installer.sh into a new scripts/ directory via git mv (executable bit and history preserved), then updated all 12 live docs (3 explicitly named + 8 additional) to scripts/-prefixed paths. Repo-wide re-grep confirms no bare-name live references remain outside the intentionally-ignored set. Both moved scripts execute and resolve the flake ref correctly, and nix flake check passes green. Note: scripts/update.sh's own pre-existing git-checkpoint logic auto-committed all Phase 1-4 changes as commit 6ba1f4e during verification (side effect of running the script, not a direct agent commit) — see plan Phase 4 deviation note and summary for details.
